headline: NeoGenomics and Charles River Laboratories Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the April PPI report showed wholesale inflation accelerating to 6% annually, with service-sector prices rising at their fastest pace in four years. Healthcare companies, drug makers, hospitals, and insurers, earn revenue from clinical services and product sales.
